general.name: HBC-Mobile
general.description: To be scoped out exclusively to TheBay users & endpoints only.
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>3EDCE31F-0C6A-47B6-B5AA-2C2D94020C7B</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>3EDCE31F-0C6A-47B6-B5AA-2C2D94020C7B</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>HBC-Mobile</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>To be scoped out exclusively to TheBay users & endpoints only. </string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>0B62348D-A90B-465F-B645-4D46A5D8B343</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.wifi.managed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>0B62348D-A90B-465F-B645-4D46A5D8B343</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>WiFi (HBC-Mobile)</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>HIDDEN_NETWORK</key><false/><key>Password</key><string>698J@ck@ndJillWentUptheHillF0r@P@il0fW@ter698</string><key>EncryptionType</key><string>WPA</string><key>AutoJoin</key><false/><key>CaptiveBypass</key><false/><key>ProxyType</key><string>None</string><key>DisableAssociationMACRandomization</key><true/><key>SetupModes</key><array/><key>SSID_STR</key><string>HBC-Mobile</string><key>Interface</key><string>BuiltInWireless</string></dict></array></dict></plist>
